metadata.description: Manage tasks you posted on Slashie and review quotes from local workers.

en.emptyDescription: Post your first task and nearby workers can send quotes.

metadata.description: 管理你在 Slashie 發佈的任務，並查看本地 worker 報價。

zh_hk.emptyDescription: 發佈第一個任務，附近 workers 便可以傳送報價。
